summary: Mobile iOS UI/UX bug fixes verification for Mira pet operating system. Tested onboarding form navigation, Mira chat widget input accessibility, and dashboard pet cards layout on iPhone X viewport (375x812). All reported bugs appear to be FIXED.

issues: Concierge shows 'Back at 9:00 IST' - offline status. Chat UI is functional but responses not working due to service being offline.

critical_code_review_comments: MembershipOnboarding.jsx: Continue buttons have proper onTouchEnd handlers with e.preventDefault() - VERIFIED
MiraChatWidget.jsx: iOS safe area CSS implemented with env(safe-area-inset-bottom) - VERIFIED at line 1712, 1254-1255
MiraChatWidget.jsx: Input has fontSize 16px to prevent iOS zoom - VERIFIED at line 1755
MiraChatWidget.jsx: touch-manipulation class applied to interactive elements - VERIFIED
MemberDashboard.jsx: Pet grid uses responsive grid-cols-2 on mobile with gap-2.5 - VERIFIED at line 1114
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile iOS bug fixes verified. All three reported issues (onboarding Continue button, Mira chat input, pet cards overlap) appear to be resolved based on code review and UI testing.

onboarding_continue_button.evidence: Continue button at y=1735 was clickable. Button has onTouchEnd handler with e.preventDefault() and touch-manipulation CSS class. Step navigation Step 1 -> Step 2 triggered successfully.

mira_chat_input_accessibility.evidence: Chat input at y=741, height=52 - fully within 812px mobile viewport. Successfully typed message 'Hello Mira, what's best for my dog?' and clicked send. Input has fontSize 16px to prevent iOS zoom, touch-manipulation class, and iOS safe area padding.

dashboard_pet_cards_layout.evidence: Pet grid uses responsive Tailwind classes: grid-cols-2 for mobile, gap-2.5 md:gap-3 for spacing, minWidth:0 to prevent blowout. Pet avatars shown in horizontal scroll row on dashboard. No visual overlap detected.

css_fixes_verified.webkit_transform: WebkitTransform: translateZ(0) for iOS rendering fix at line 1713
css_fixes_verified.touch_manipulation: Applied to all interactive elements for better touch response
css_fixes_verified.font_size_16px: Input has fontSize 16px to prevent iOS zoom on focus
